The '''''Brilliant''''' was a [[Nebula-class Star Destroyer|''Nebula''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==History==
Assigned to the [[New Republic Second Fleet|New Republic Second Battle Group]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], the ''Brilliant'' was tasked with close planetary patrol of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

When the [[Aramadia (Aramadia-class)|''Aramadia'']] attempted to make an unauthorized departure and damaged its surrounding ships, the ''Brilliant'' was sent to shadow the vessel under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]. It was called off by [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] after [[Nil Spaar]] broadcast that she desired to declare herself Empress and was violating his diplomatic rights.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''
